message:
🐛 update console version dropdown to v0.3.19 (#1378)

* fix: update console version dropdown to v0.3.19 and add console/mcp support to update-version.js

Console version was stuck at v0.3.6 while latest stable release is v0.3.19.
Also adds console and kubestellar-mcp to the update-version.js project map
so the goodnight workflow can auto-update versions going forward.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: keep main as default for console docs, add v0.3.19 as historical version

Console docs default to main so users always see latest content.
Release versions are added as historical entries in the dropdown.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,16 +2,20 @@
   "surveyUrl": "https://forms.gle/Md2381TQ8CcjZv3LA",
   "versions": {
     "console": {
-      "latest": {
-        "label": "v0.3.6 (Latest)",
-        "branch": "docs/console/0.3.6",
-        "isDefault": true
-      },
       "main": {
-        "label": "main (dev)",
+        "label": "main (latest)",
         "branch": "main",
-        "isDefault": false,
-        "isDev": true
+        "isDefault": true
+      },
+      "0.3.19": {
+        "label": "v0.3.19",
+        "branch": "docs/console/0.3.19",
+        "isDefault": false
+      },
+      "0.3.6": {
+        "label": "v0.3.6",
+        "branch": "docs/console/0.3.6",
+        "isDefault": false
       },
       "0.1.0": {
         "label": "v0.1.0",
@@ -175,7 +179,7 @@
     "console": {
       "name": "KubeStellar Console",
       "basePath": "console",
-      "currentVersion": "0.3.6"
+      "currentVersion": "main"
     },
     "kubestellar": {
       "name": "KubeStellar",
@@ -247,5 +251,5 @@
     "multi-plugin": "https://github.com/kubestellar/docs/edit/main/docs/content/multi-plugin",
     "kubestellar-mcp": "https://github.com/kubestellar/kubestellar-mcp/edit/main/docs"
   },
-  "updatedAt": "2026-01-16T18:24:27.434Z"
+  "updatedAt": "2026-04-09T12:00:00.000Z"
 }
